preserveUserBrands: assets/brands/* except assets/brands/example/ (example is updatable, user brands are not)

featureFlags._doc: Runtime feature flags read at Electron startup. Do NOT rely on these for security-critical defaults — a stale version.json on an offline client stays at the shipped values. Security-critical changes must land as code pushes with a version bump.

notes: v1.23.0: Stefan Georgi RMBC parity — pain copy that users feel RIGHT NOW + StefanBrain.com-grade funnel teardown analyzer + canonical 7-frame quiz funnel generator. Anchor: 2026-05-15. THE SYSTEMIC UPGRADE: every creative Merlin produces is now structured against Stefan Georgi's RMBC method — Research, Mechanism, Brief, Copy. Pre-v1.23.0 RMBC was a one-line dropdown reference in merlin-content; now it's a load-bearing schema enforced through five layers of source code. PAINSTATE SCHEMA (iter 1): BrandManifestPersona.PainState{BodyLocation, PresentTenseTrigger, SensoryCue, Mechanism, FailedSolutions[]} — every persona can declare its body-felt pain anchor. validateBrandManifest enforces specificity (body_location ≥2 words — 'lower belly under the ribs', not 'stomach'), present-tense (trigger must read present-continuous — rejects 'she felt tired'), and ≥3 words per failed_solution entry. forbidden_pain_framings extends Rule 12 HARD veto to pain copy. AdBrief.PainState carries the same shape through to render time; runImagePipeline auto-resolves from the matched persona when the brief is empty. CheckBrief emits pain_framing_forbidden_for_brand (Rule 12 parity) + pain_state_missing on matrix-driven briefs whose persona declares PainState but the sampler didn't propagate it. RUBRIC + COPY QUALITY GATE (iter 2): rubric.go gains 5 polish checks — pain_body_localized, pain_present_tense, pain_sensory_anchor, pain_mechanism_named (mandatory when angle=mechanism), pain_failed_solution_validated. format_brief_check.go gains opening_scenario_tense_not_present + conflict_beat_tense_not_present warns (catches authoring past-tense regressions before generation). merlin-content's Copy Quality Gate grows from 7 to 8 experts — the new Stefan Georgi pain-state copywriter weighs 1.5× (parity with the AI-writing detector) and scores: present-continuous tense, named body location, sensory cue ≥1 per 100 words, named mechanism when angle=mechanism, validated failed solution ≥1. FUNNEL TEARDOWN ANALYZER (iter 3): new funnel-teardown action — fetch a URL, score it against the 20-criterion RMBC rubric (5 criteria × 4 sections: LEAD / MECHANISM / PAIN AMPLIFICATION / CLOSE), emit letter grades with leak callouts. Output: results/teardown_<ts>/teardown.{json,md,raw.html}. This is Merlin's StefanBrain.com equivalent — same Stefan Georgi rubric, same section-by-section grading, same 'top 6 leaks ordered by section weight' fix list. The 20 criterion IDs are stable so wisdom aggregates across brands. QUIZ FUNNEL GENERATOR (iter 4): new quiz-funnel-gen action — given the brand's persona + PainState, generate the canonical Stefan Georgi 7-frame quiz funnel (entry → demographic → symptom → failed_solution → mechanism reveal → results → offer with 30/60/90-day segment pricing). Output is a self-contained HTML file (vanilla JS state machine, inline CSS, no CDN dependencies) deployable to any static host. requireApproval-gated per Hard-Won Security Rule 18. Email-capture via configurable POST endpoint; about:blank fallback for safe local previews. All manifest-supplied strings HTML-escaped — no XSS holes from a hostile manifest. TELEMETRY (iter 5): WisdomAdEntry gains 5 new fields parallel to angle — PainBodyLocation, PainSensoryCue, MechanismType (categorical bucket via mechanismTypeFromText: hormonal/neurological/metabolic/musculoskeletal/psychological/other), FailedSolnCount (clamped 0-20), RMBCGrade (A→F when funnel-teardown ran on the LP). wisdom-api/worker.js adds 5 new aggregation buckets (painBodies, painCues, mechanismTypes, failedSolutionDensity, rmbcGrades) — same omit-on-empty pattern as iter-4 persona/LP buckets so legacy ads don't dilute aggregates. The wisdom system now learns which (body location, sensory cue, mechanism category, failed-solution density, RMBC grade) combinations win across brands. SKILLS: merlin-content gets the 8th Copy Quality Gate expert; mcp__merlin__dashboard adds 'funnel-teardown' action; mcp__merlin__content adds 'quiz-funnel-gen' action. TEST COVERAGE: 19 PainState schema tests, 14 rubric + tense-lint tests, 23 funnel-teardown tests, 14 quiz-funnel tests, 2 wisdom-telemetry tests. Full Go suite stays green (241s); full JS suite 71 wisdom-api + 52 mcp-tools + 6 mcp-parity tests stay green. NO BREAKING CHANGES — legacy briefs without PainState generate creatives via existing free-prose path; rubric polish checks pass when PainState is absent (no false-negative gating). BACK-COMPAT FOOTNOTE: from v1.22.4 (persona × LP × Andromeda) and v1.23.0 (Stefan Georgi RMBC), Merlin now provides StefanBrain.com-tier funnel analysis + Stefan Georgi-tier pain copywriting through the SAME existing creative pipeline, with zero new tool surface — the agent simply pulls richer signal from a brand-manifest enriched with PainState. PRIOR RELEASE v1.22.4: Persona × Landing-Page × Andromeda binding + Shopify App Store unblock + Meta-connect parse fix. Anchor: 2026-05-14. PERSONA × LP × ANDROMEDA (RSI iters 1-5 — the centerpiece systemic upgrade): every creative the matrix sampler produces is now structurally tagged to (a) ONE persona from the brand's manifest roster, (b) ONE landing page that warms that persona, AND (c) a 3-axis Andromeda signature (Race, Context, Style) so a 20-image batch never silently mono-cultures. Anchor: 2026-05-14. PERSONA × LP × ANDROMEDA (RSI iters 1-5 — the centerpiece systemic upgrade): every creative the matrix sampler produces is now structurally tagged to (a) ONE persona from the brand's manifest roster, (b) ONE landing page that warms that persona, AND (c) a 3-axis Andromeda signature (Race, Context, Style) so a 20-image batch never silently mono-cultures. SCHEMA (PR #188): BrandManifest gains Personas, LandingPages, AndromedaAxes, ForbiddenPersonas, ForbiddenLandingPages — every field is optional for back-compat (asset-only legacy manifests still load clean). New validateBrandManifest mirrors brand_guide.go's validator pattern with the load-bearing mono-ethnic refusal invariant (≥2 non-zero race buckets required). 24 new schema tests in brand_manifest_persona_test.go. ADBRIEF + CHECKBRIEF (PR #189): AdBrief gains PersonaSlug, LandingPageURL, Race, Context, Style fields. CheckBrief emits 7 new IssueError codes (persona_missing / persona_unknown / persona_forbidden_for_brand / landing_page_missing / landing_page_unknown / landing_page_forbidden_for_brand / persona_landing_page_incompatible). Prompt builder bakes persona emotional triggers + race + context + style into the rendered prompt as scene/style anchors near opening-token weight. MATRIX (PR #189/#264): merlin-creative-engine SKILL.md Phase 1 matrix grown from 8 → 13 axes (persona / landing_page / race / context / style added). matrix_integrity.go runtime gate enforces forbidden_* HARD vetoes, persona ↔ LP compatibility, race never-mono-ethnic, axis-collapse checks. OUTPUT BINDING (PR #189): RunMeta + WisdomAdEntry + meta.go link_url + wisdom-api aggregation buckets — every creative records (persona_slug, persona_label, landing_page_url, race, context, style) in metadata.json AND in cross-brand telemetry. Archive cards surface '→ <persona> → <LP path>' label on every matrix-driven run. AUTO-FILL (PR #264): brand-manifest-scaffolder.js accepts structured personas + LPs + andromeda axes via opts.extras; applyRaceDefault injects US Census distribution when persona declares no race_distribution (fail-safe defends never-mono-ethnic invariant); andromeda_axes defaults to 11 contexts + 8 styles when not overridden. SHOPIFY APP STORE UNBLOCK (PR #190): App Store rejected v1.22.3 submission on rule 2.1.1 — reviewer's first install raced Shopify's 5-30s token-propagation window, hit a 403 on /shop.json, and saw the dashboard's orange banner exposing the raw status code. Three fixes shipped together: shopifyAdminFetch retries on 403 with [0, 1500, 3000]ms backoff (covers the propagation race), the stub renderer drops the alarming orange banner (raw status codes never surface to users per Hard-Won Rule 6), <meta http-equiv='refresh' content='10'> closes the race window without user intervention. META-CONNECT PARSE FIX (PR #265): live incident — Meta OAuth completed successfully but the binary printed two JSON blocks back-to-back, the old extractJsonBlock line-trim heuristic concatenated them, JSON.parse failed with 'Unexpected non-whitespace character after JSON at position 73', raw error surfaced in the Connection Failed modal. Two fixes: extractJsonBlock gains a balanced-brace fallback scanner with string-literal awareness that correctly identifies a single complete JSON object; friendlyError gains a 'Failed to parse exchange result' branch that emits a sympathetic Reconnect chip instead of passing the raw parse error verbatim. ANDROMEDA-FRIENDLY DEFAULTS: DefaultAndromedaContexts (at-home, kitchen, bedroom, bathroom, on-the-go, commute, desk-at-work, workout, outdoors, social, travel), DefaultAndromedaStyles (lifestyle-candid, lifestyle-staged, layflat, product-hero-clean, ugc-still, editorial, macro-detail, environmental-portrait), DefaultUSCensusRaceDistribution. TEST COVERAGE: 24 schema tests, 13 brief-discipline tests, 11 matrix-integrity tests, 7 scaffolder-persona tests, 8 Shopify-403-retry tests, 15 oauth-parse-fix tests. Full Go suite + full JS suite (1212/1212) stay green. NO BREAKING CHANGES — legacy brands without a persona-equipped manifest still generate creatives via the existing free-prose path; the schema additions are pure enhancement. The matrix sampler in merlin-creative-engine will adopt the 5 new axes as agent-side discipline; runtime gates catch sampler bugs at CheckBrief time.
whatsNew: Stefan Georgi RMBC pain copy — every persona can now declare a 5-field PainState (body location, present-tense trigger, sensory cue, named mechanism, failed solutions); copy gate rejects past-tense pain
Funnel teardown analyzer — point Merlin at any URL, get a section-by-section Stefan Georgi rubric grade + ordered leak fixes (Merlin's StefanBrain.com equivalent)

Quiz funnel generator — produce the canonical 7-frame Stefan Georgi quiz (entry → demographic → symptom → failed_solution → mechanism → results → offer) as a deployable HTML file from your brand manifest
Copy Quality Gate grows from 7 → 8 experts — the new Stefan Georgi pain-state copywriter weighs 1.5× and scores body-localization + sensory cues + named mechanism + failed-solution validation
Wisdom aggregates 5 new pain dimensions across brands — body location, sensory cue, mechanism type, failed-solution density, RMBC grade
